availability_zone_name.description: The availability zone name in which to create the file system.

creation_token.description: A unique name (1-16 letters, numbers, and underscores) used as reference when creating the file system so that the file system can be mounted on instances by using this name.

encrypted.description: Whether to enable encryption for the file system.

kms_key_id.description: The ARN for the KMS key that is used to encrypt the file system.

lifecycle_policy.type: list(object({transition_to_ia: string, transition_to_archive: string, transition_to_primary_storage_class: string}))
lifecycle_policy.description: A file system lifecycle policy for the file system.

protection.description: The file system protection policy for the file system.

performance_mode.description: The file system performance mode to set.

provisioned_throughput_in_mibps.description: The throughput, measured in MiB/s, that you want to provision for the file system.

throughput_mode.description: The throughput mode for the file system.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the file system.
